description: Nick and Jacob discuss the latest updates in the Solana ecosystem, including the introduction of SIMD152 for precompiles, making Borsh optional in SDKs, and ongoing BPF migration efforts.
topic_summary: The video covers updates on SIMD152 precompiles [t=19:36], Borsh optionality [t=163:45], and the core BPF migration process [t=236:36].
